parameters.body: ={"statements":[{"statement":"MATCH (d:Document) WHERE d.embedding IS NULL RETURN d.title AS title, d.content AS content","parameters":{}}]}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { id:'chunk1', text:'Retrieval Augmented Generation combines search and LLM generation.', source:'week7' } }, { json: { id:'chunk2', text:'Embeddings convert text into vectors so meaning can be compared mathematically.', source:'week7' } }, { json: { id:'chunk3', text:'Vector databases store embeddings and allow semantic similarity search.', source:'week7' } }];

return items.map((item,index)=>{const original=$items('Sample Chunks')[index].json;return { json:{ id:original.id, text:original.text, source:original.source, embedding:item.json.data[0].embedding } };});

return items.map(item=>{const body={ statements:[ { statement:'MERGE (c:Chunk {id:$id}) SET c.text=$text, c.source=$source, c.embedding=$embedding', parameters:{ id:item.json.id, text:item.json.text, source:item.json.source, embedding:item.json.embedding } } ] }; return { json:{ neo4jBody:JSON.stringify(body) } };});

parameters.name: statements[0].statement
parameters.value: =MATCH (d:Document) WHERE toLower(d.content) CONTAINS toLower($query) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:LINKS_TO]->(related) RETURN d.title AS title, collect(related.title) AS related

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { question: 'How do vector databases work?' } }];
return items.map((item, index) => ({ json: { question: $items('Set Question')[index].json.question, embedding: item.json.data[0].embedding } }));

const body = { statements: [{ statement: `CALL db.index.vector.queryNodes('course_chunks', 3, $embedding) YIELD node, score RETURN node.id AS id, node.text AS text, node.source AS source, score ORDER BY score DESC`, parameters: { embedding: items[0].json.embedding } }] }; return [{ json: { question: items[0].json.question, neo4jBody: JSON.stringify(body) } }];

parameters.body: ={   "statements": [     {       "statement": "CALL db.index.vector.queryNodes('course_chunks', 3, $embedding) YIELD node, score RETURN node.id AS id, node.text AS text, node.source AS source, score ORDER BY score DESC",       "parameters": {         "embedding": {{$json["embedding"]}}       }     }   ] }

parameters.jsCode: return items.map(item => { const rows = item.json.results?.[0]?.data ?? []; return { json: { matches: rows.map(r => ({ id: r.row[0], text: r.row[1], source: r.row[2], score: r.row[3] })) } }; });
